subcodes.first_line: ...Consider thou how the power of the Word of God has united the East and the West and bestowed spiritual communication, that a blessed soul from the inhabitants of America, while in the Holy Land
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @East and West; communication between East and West
